heading: Tobacco proclamation authority
label: 3621 Tobacco proclamation authority
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date of entry into force of the WTO Agreement with respect to the United States (), except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1995section 451 of Pub. L. 103–465section 3601 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The President, after consultation with the Committee on Ways and Means of the House of Representatives and with the Committee on Finance of the Senate, may proclaim the reduction or elimination of any duty with respect to cigar binder and filler tobacco, wrapper tobacco, or oriental tobacco set forth in Schedule XX.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: b Effective date
children.text: This section shall take effect on .December 8, 1994
